text:
さすがです！
私、もはや訓練メニューを考えるより
貴方様の応援だけしてたいですわ！

私と比べて、上達が早すぎますわ。
ま、私は特別遅かったんですけどね！

なにはともあれ、お疲れ様でした。
次も新しいメニューを考えておくので
是非また受けて欲しいですわ。

Hey, I knew you could do it! I'd much rather
spend my day backing you up than thinking up
training courses.

You're improving so much faster than I did
when I was at your level. I guess that's more
of a reflection on me than on you!

In any case, good work out there. I'll think up
another new training course soon, so come on
back and kick some butt.

Let's go exploring again sometime, okay?
See you later!
